title: ixeris serotina
intro: Ixeris serotina, also known as the late-flowering dandelion, is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family, Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve liver and gallbladder issues. The health benefits of Ixeris serotina include reducing inflammation, improving liver function, and aiding in digestion, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various gastrointestinal issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
